title: Action Branch Cache Plan Bundle
description: A conceptual ABC plan bundle with a short main plan, two to four cached action branches, and replan_if conditions.

task.description: The task for which this plan bundle was prepared.

world_state_summary.description: An external summary consumed by ABC; ABC does not build or validate the world state.

main_plan.description: A short sequence for the expected path.

cached_action_branches.description: Two to four short-lived condition-bound action branches considered during execution.

replan_if.description: Conditions indicating that the plan bundle is invalid, the event is unknown, or the situation is high-risk.

actionBranch.description: A cached action branch with a condition identifier, trigger, bounded action, validity condition, expiration time, and fallback.

condition.description: A stable identifier for the condition represented by this cached action branch.

priority.description: A relative arbitration hint, not an event probability or safety level.

trigger.description: A condition that can be matched against an observation during execution.

action.description: The cached abstract action considered when trigger matches and valid_if holds.

valid_if.description: A condition that must still hold before the cached action can be used.

expire_after_ms.description: The maximum age of this cached action branch after the plan bundle is loaded.

fallback.description: A bounded fallback path used when this cached action branch cannot be applied; high-risk cases should be routed to an external fallback or replanning path rather than handled as ordinary cache hits.
